item: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

flip_turn.quote: Saya tidak setuju dengan argumen bahwa hukum cukup melindungi hak individu di Indonesia.

notes: Agent A begins by supporting society-priority with a balance caveat, still supports it in turn 3, then shifts by turn 5 into a critique that Indonesian law and implementation fail to protect individual rights. Agent B remains consistently balanced and rights-protective, conceding implementation problems without changing its position.
